message:
test(proptest): add 22 property tests for swarm pipeline and connector governor coverage gaps

Swarm pipeline (19 new, 56→75 total): LogLevel serde+Debug, PreconditionCheck serde,
PipelineCondition serde, CircuitBreakerConfig serde+Default, CircuitBreaker serde,
RecoveryPolicy serde+Default, CompensatingAction serde, HookContext serde,
PipelineStep serde, PipelineDefinition serde, PipelineExecution serde.

Connector governor (3 new, 36→39 total): ConnectorGovernorConfig Default serde,
GovernorSnapshot serde roundtrip, GovernorSnapshot JSON key validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
